pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties from 8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if source/target levels remain at 1.8 while running on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the 'release' configuration from maven-compiler-plugin to avoid conflicts with source/target settings on JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using both 'release' and 'source'/'target' in maven-compiler-plugin can cause configuration conflicts or unexpected behavior in newer Maven compiler plugin versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the '-proc:none' compiler argument as the custom annotation processor plugin is removed.
pom.xml.why_exists: The argument is no longer needed and may be redundant or confusing without the specific annotation processor setup.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the apt-maven-plugin and its associated build-helper-maven-plugin execution for generated sources.
pom.xml.why_exists: The plugin is removed, so its configuration and dependencies must be removed to prevent build errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.11.0 for better JDK 17 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support JDK 17 features or may have bugs with newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update build-helper-maven-plugin version to 3.4.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with newer Maven versions and JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot 3.1.2 dependency management, which requires JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JDK 17+; using it on JDK 8 would fail at runtime or compile time.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Vert.x 4.4.4 dependency management, which requires JDK 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Vert.x 4.x requires JDK 11+; using it on JDK 8 would fail.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Hibernate Validator 7.0.2 dependency management, which requires Jakarta EE 9+ (JDK 11+).
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate Validator 7.x uses Jakarta EE namespaces and requires JDK 11+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JUnit 5.9.2 dependency management, replacing older JUnit versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 5 is the standard for modern Java testing and is required by many new frameworks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Mockito 5.2.0 dependency management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito 5.x requires JDK 11+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jackson 2.15.2 dependency management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent versioning of Jackson libraries across the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Log4j 2.20.0 dependency management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent versioning of Log4j libraries and addresses security vulnerabilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok 1.18.28 dependency management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent versioning of Lombok across the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok Maven Plugin for delomboking sources for javadoc generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Lombok annotations are not visible to javadoc by default; delomboking generates plain Java sources for documentation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-javadoc-plugin to use delomboked sources.
pom.xml.why_exists: Javadoc generation fails if Lombok annotations are present and not processed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-surefire-plugin 3.1.2 for test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Surefire 3.x is required for JUnit 5 support and JDK 17 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-site-plugin 3.10.0 for site generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with newer Maven versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add site-maven-plugin for GitHub deployment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Enables deployment of artifacts to GitHub releases and branches.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add git-commit-id-maven-plugin for generating git information.
pom.xml.why_exists: Provides build-time git information for artifacts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add versions-maven-plugin for managing dependency versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Helps in updating and managing dependency versions across the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add profiles for git-info, list-property-updates, and list-all-updates.
pom.xml.why_exists: Provides optional build profiles for generating git info and listing dependency updates.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add distributionManagement for internal repository deployment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Configures the target repository for deploying artifacts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update groupId and artifactId to reflect new project structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Reflects the new project identity and structure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update version to 2.2.0-SNAPSHOT.
pom.xml.why_exists: Reflects the current development version of the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Kotlin version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Supports Kotlin development in the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM options property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Allows passing JVM options to tests and other plugins.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add project.build.sourceEncoding property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures consistent character encoding for source files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add delombok output directory property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Configures the output directory for delomboked sources.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add GitHub deployment properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: Configures GitHub deployment settings for the site-maven-plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency version properties for various libraries.
pom.xml.why_exists: Centralizes dependency version management for consistency and ease of updates.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add plugin version properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: Centralizes plugin version management for consistency and ease of updates.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add direct dependencies for git-commit-id-maven-plugin and versions-maven-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: These plugins are used in the build process and need to be declared as dependencies.
